textPlain: Does it cache dependency crates to nix store? Does it result to speed-up in builds?
how does it compare with the devbox project

Yes, it does vendor all the crates to Nix store.It results into speed up in a way that if your application doesn't change, you'll just get the binary package.That's why the two interfaces are exposed: one for development feedback cycle and one for distribution.
This post is talking about building your project with Nix, and only tangentially about dev environments à la devbox.
We're aiming to take Nix to its most simple form, while devbox uses json for configuration.Think of devenv as systemd of developer environments.
